---
title: "PSMS"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    fig_caption: yes
bibliography: ../REFERENCES.bib
link-citations: true
reference-section-title: References
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{PSMS}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
---
# Overview

```{r model_family_header, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_header(
  family = "psms",
  pages = c(
    Overview = "index.html",
    Implementation = "psms-implementation.html",
    Theory = "psms-theory.html"
  )
)
```


These pages are rooted in exact spheroidal-coordinate separations and later fisheries-acoustics use of prolate-spheroid models [@Spence_1951; @Furusawa_1988].

```{r psms_overview, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_overview(
  family = "psms",
  summary = paste(
    "The prolate spheroidal modal series solution (`PSMS`) is the exact",
    "single-target modal family for homogeneous prolate spheroids. It is the",
    "spheroidal analogue of spherical partial-wave theory and the natural",
    "exact reference for elongated canonical bodies whose surface follows a",
    "prolate spheroid."
  ),
  core_idea = paste(
    "Separate the Helmholtz equation in prolate spheroidal coordinates,",
    "expand the incident, scattered, and interior fields in spheroidal wave",
    "functions, and solve the retained boundary systems order by order."
  ),
  best_for = c(
    "Rigid, pressure-release, liquid-filled, and gas-filled prolate spheroids",
    "Canonical elongated-body benchmarks",
    "Validating prolate branches of more general methods such as `TMM`"
  ),
  supports = c(
    "`ProlateSpheroid` shapes on `FLS` or `GAS` objects",
    "Exact monostatic target strength for homogeneous single-region spheroids",
    "Spheroidal modal solutions in which medium `1` is seawater and medium `2` is the spheroid interior"
  ),
  assumptions = c(
    "Perfect prolate spheroidal geometry",
    "Homogeneous interior region",
    "Linear, time-harmonic acoustics",
    "No shell or internal secondary component"
  ),
  reading = c(
    "[Implementation](psms-implementation.html): workflows, comparisons, and timing tables",
    "[Theory](psms-theory.html): full spheroidal-coordinate derivation and retained modal systems"
  )
)
```
